skill.name: buddy-sings
skill.description: Creates personalized songs for a Claude Code /buddy pet by deriving a consistent vocal identity, writing pet-perspective lyrics, generating music with the MiniMax mmx CLI, and playing the saved audio file.
skill.summary: Generate a personalized song for a Claude Code buddy pet with a consistent voice.
skill.author: MiniMax-AI

security_audit.summary: Static command and filesystem findings are mostly true positives because the skill instructs the agent to run CLI commands, read Claude configuration, scan memory files, inspect git history, cache voice data, and play generated audio. The weak cryptography detections appear to be false positives from prose and Markdown examples; no cryptographic operation was found. The main confirmed risk is privacy exposure: personal memory and work context can be gathered automatically and included in material sent to an external MiniMax music service.

high_findings.title: Automatic Personal Context Collection for External Generation
high_findings.description: The skill instructs the agent to automatically inspect current conversation activity, Claude memory files, and recent git history when a request implies personal context. That context can be incorporated into lyrics or prompts used by the MiniMax mmx music generation CLI, creating a high privacy risk even though the user is shown a preview before generation.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file explicitly instructs automatic context scanning and then uses generated prompt material in an external CLI call. The risk is privacy exposure, not confirmed malicious exfiltration.

high_findings.title: Sensitive Claude Configuration and Memory File Access
high_findings.description: The skill directs the agent to read ~/.claude.json and scan ~/.claude memory directories. These files may contain personal profile data, interaction history, project details, or other sensitive user information unrelated to music generation.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: The instructions name hidden Claude files and directories directly. The exact sensitivity of each file varies, but the access target is clearly personal application state.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Execution with User-Derived Arguments
medium_findings.description: The skill provides shell commands for package installation, authentication, file discovery, music generation, and playback. The music commands use values such as pet name, prompt, lyrics, and output paths; unsafe substitution could cause shell injection if an agent passes unescaped text through a shell.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The commands are documented intended behavior and not hidden code, but several arguments are derived from user or local profile content. Injection depends on how the agent executes the examples.

medium_findings.title: External Service Dependency Requires API Authentication
medium_findings.description: The skill instructs users to install mmx-cli and authenticate with a MiniMax API key. Generated prompts and lyrics are processed by an external service, so users need clear consent and data-handling expectations before use.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The MiniMax CLI and API key setup are explicit. The finding is moderate because external generation is the core purpose, but marketplace users must understand the network and data-sharing behavior.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Static Findings Are False Positives
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm indicators, but review found no cryptographic hashing, encryption, random token generation, or password handling logic. The detections appear to match ordinary Markdown text, examples, or unrelated prose.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review of the referenced file found no crypto API use. The static labels are unsupported by semantic context.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Findings Are Limited Operational Checks
low_findings.description: The system reconnaissance detections map to checking recent git history, selecting genre guidance, and detecting available audio players. These are expected workflow steps, though git history can still reveal work details.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The commands are visible and tied to song personalization or playback. The main concern is secondary privacy exposure from git history, already covered in the high finding.

dangerous_patterns.title: Hidden Home Directory Reads
dangerous_patterns.description: Reads and scans hidden Claude configuration and memory paths in the user home directory.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The paths are explicitly listed and are part of the intended workflow. Their content may include sensitive user data.

dangerous_patterns.title: External CLI Invocation
dangerous_patterns.description: Runs mmx music generate with prompts, lyrics, and output paths derived from local and user-provided context.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The command is clearly shown as the generation mechanism. It is expected functionality but creates network and argument-handling risk.

content.user_title: Generate Songs for Your Buddy Pet
content.value_statement: Users want their Claude Code buddy to feel more personal and expressive. This skill turns the buddy profile into a consistent singing voice, lyrics, generated music, and local playback.
actual_capabilities: Reads the Claude Code buddy profile from the local Claude configuration.
Creates and caches a vocal identity based on the buddy name and personality.
Gathers optional context from conversation, memory files, and git history for personal songs.
Builds pet-perspective lyrics and MiniMax music prompts.
Generates MP3 files through the mmx CLI and saves them locally.
Plays generated songs with mpv, ffplay, or afplay when available.
limitations: Requires the MiniMax mmx CLI and a valid MiniMax API key.
May read sensitive local Claude memory or project context during personalization.
Audio quality and generation results depend on the external MiniMax service.
Playback requires a supported local audio player.

use_cases.title: Create a Buddy Theme Song
use_cases.description: Generate a short song that matches a Claude Code buddy name, personality, and preferred language.

use_cases.title: Celebrate a Work Session
use_cases.description: Turn recent commits or session activity into a playful song from the buddy perspective.

use_cases.title: Make Personalized Audio Gifts
use_cases.description: Create a custom song about a mood, story, or event using a consistent buddy voice.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Buddy Song
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request with a clear theme.
prompt_templates.prompt: Ask my buddy to sing a cheerful song about finishing a good day of coding.

prompt_templates.title: Specific Mood and Genre
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants more control over musical style.
prompt_templates.prompt: Have my buddy sing a calm city pop song about waiting by the window for me to come home.

prompt_templates.title: Personal Work Recap
prompt_templates.scenario: Use local session or git context for personalization.
prompt_templates.prompt: Let my buddy sing about what I worked on today, but show me the lyrics and prompt before generating.

prompt_templates.title: Regenerate Voice and Lyrics
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request that changes cached voice behavior.
prompt_templates.prompt: Regenerate my buddy voice, write first-person lyrics in Spanish, and make the song a playful funk track.

output_examples.input: Ask my buddy to sing about today's work.
output_examples.output: The assistant finds the buddy profile, gathers recent work context, previews complete lyrics and song description, then asks for confirmation before generation.

output_examples.input: Make my buddy sing a rainy day lullaby.
output_examples.output: The assistant skips personal context gathering, creates a gentle lullaby prompt, saves the generated MP3, and attempts local playback.

output_examples.input: Change the voice and try a faster style.
output_examples.output: The assistant clears the cached vocal identity, derives a new voice from the buddy personality, and prepares a faster song variation.

best_practices: Review all lyrics and prompt details before confirming external generation.
Use clear themes, languages, and genre preferences when requesting a song.
Avoid personal context mode when memory files or git history may contain sensitive information.
anti_patterns: Do not generate songs from private work context without reviewing the preview.
Do not place secrets, API keys, or confidential project details in song themes.
Do not assume the cached voice updates automatically after personality changes.

faq.question: Does this skill require an external service?
faq.answer: Yes. It uses the MiniMax mmx CLI for music generation and requires MiniMax API authentication.

faq.question: Where are generated songs saved?
faq.answer: The skill saves MP3 files under the local Music minimax-gen directory.

faq.question: Can the buddy keep the same voice?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill caches a vocal identity for the buddy name and personality.

faq.question: Can it write lyrics in other languages?
faq.answer: Yes. It detects the user language and can follow explicit lyric language requests.

faq.question: What local data can it read?
faq.answer: It may read the buddy profile, Claude memory files, current session context, and recent git history.

faq.question: Is it safe for confidential projects?
faq.answer: Use caution. Personal context may be included in prompts sent to an external music service.
